strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, aligning with required AI skills
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and craftsmanship
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and contact info, raising red flags about professionalism or identity
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in context of enterprise automation — key stack elements
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially hindering collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent experience, and a track record of building scalable systems — all core to the role. However, the persistent use of a different name (Szabo Bogdan) across contact details, GitHub, and LinkedIn raises serious concerns about authenticity or professionalism, which cannot be ignored in an enterprise setting despite strong technical qualifications.
